title: Cognitive Complexity of Functions Should Not Be Too High
description: Excessive cognitive complexity in functions can make them hard to understand, maintain, and test.
recommendation: Refactor the function to reduce its cognitive complexity.

noncompliant.code:
def nc_function(a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i):
    x = a + b
    y = c * d
    z = e**f
    w = g - h
    v = i / x**2
    return w + z - v

compliant.code:
def c_function(a, b):
    return a + b

why_is_this_an_issue: High cognitive complexity makes code harder to understand, test, and maintain.
how_to_fix: Refactor the function to reduce its cognitive complexity.
